components.name: App
components.description: Root application component. Orchestrates the quiz flow state machine: config -> loading -> in-progress -> results/error. Renders the appropriate child component based on session state.

components.name: QuizConfig
components.description: Quiz configuration screen. Lets user select quiz type (3 options) and question count (5/10/15/20). Calls onStart with the chosen config.

components.name: MultipleChoice
components.description: Renders a single Name-the-Class multiple-choice question. Shows drug name, 4 answer options, progress bar. Highlights correct/incorrect on answer, then shows Next/See Results button.

components.name: MatchingQuiz
components.description: Renders a matching question (drug-to-class or brand-to-generic). Two-column layout where user clicks left item then right item to form pairs. Color-coded pair indicators. Shows correct answers after submit.

components.name: QuizResults
components.description: Displays end-of-session results: percentage score with color-coded grade, correct/incorrect/total breakdown, per-question dot indicators, and Retry/New Quiz buttons.

hooks.name: useQuizSession
hooks.description: Core session state machine. Manages quiz lifecycle: start (generates questions via API), submit answers, advance questions, compute results, reset. Handles loading and error states.

services.name: api-client
services.description: Typed wrapper around the drug-gate API. All requests go through /api proxy (Vite dev server adds X-API-Key header and forwards to drug-gate). Exports 5 functions matching the 5 API endpoints. Throws DrugApiError on non-OK responses.

services.name: quiz-generators
services.description: Question generation logic implementing the three quiz recipes from the API contract. Uses fetchRandomEpcClasses() to pick a random page of EPC classes (pagination-aware), then finds drugs within those classes. Brand-generic matching collects across multiple classes using a hasRealBrandName filter. Returns typed question objects.

types.name: api
types.description: TypeScript interfaces mirroring the drug-gate API response shapes: Pagination, PaginatedResponse<T>, DrugName, DrugClass, DrugClassLookup, DrugClassEntry, DrugInClass, NdcLookup, ApiError, and query param interfaces.

types.name: quiz
types.description: Quiz domain types: QuizType union, QuizConfig, MultipleChoiceQuestion, MatchingQuestion, Question union, Answer, QuizSession (with status: loading|in-progress|complete), QuizResults.

apiProxy.authInjection: X-API-Key header added from DRUG_GATE_API_KEY env var

directoryStructure.src/services/: API client and quiz question generators
